---
title: "The Rev. Thomas Waddon Martyn"
---

## The Rev. Thomas Waddon Martyn

**Dates:** (1808-1846)

### Description

Rector of Lifton and Vicar of Thorverton

### Biography

He married Sophia Coleridge, niece of Sir John Taylor Coleridge.  Their daughter Paulina was a member of the Gosling Society.

### Letters

- Letter from April 22nd [1872]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
